---
title: "Team"
listing:
  - id: pi
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: default
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [pi]

  - id: all
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: grid
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [all]

  - id: phd
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: default
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [phd]
---

## Group Leader
::: {#pi}
:::

## People A-Z
::: {#all}
:::
